name: golang-github-azure-azure-sdk-for-go-dev
title: golang-github-azure-azure-sdk-for-go-dev
description:
Microsoft Azure SDK for Go
This project provides various Go packages to perform operations on Microsoft
Azure REST APIs.
.
See list of implemented API clients here
(http://godoc.org/github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-go).
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use golang-github-azure-azure-sdk-for-go-dev because Microsoft Azure SDK for Go.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use golang-github-azure-azure-sdk-for-go-dev as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair golang-github-azure-azure-sdk-for-go-dev with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `golang-github-azure-azure-sdk-for-go-dev --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
